context: Create crates/anvilml-server/src/ws/broadcaster.rs: pub struct EventBroadcaster{tx:broadcast::Sender<WsEvent>}. pub fn new()->Self (capacity 1024). pub fn send(&self,event:WsEvent): tx.send; tracing::warn! on Err (lagged). pub fn subscribe(&self)->broadcast::Receiver<WsEvent>. Add Arc<EventBroadcaster> to AppState. Create ws/mod.rs declaring broadcaster/handler/stats_tick. cargo test -p anvilml-server -- broadcaster exits 0 >=3 tests.

Create crates/anvilml-server/src/ws/handler.rs: pub async fn ws_events(ws:WebSocketUpgrade, State(state):State<AppState>)->Response. On upgrade: subscribe broadcaster. Loop: recv event -> serde_json::to_string -> ws.send(Message::Text). Close on send error. tracing::info!("ws client connected") and tracing::info!("ws client disconnected") at open/close. Mount GET /v1/events in build_router. websocat ws://127.0.0.1:8488/v1/events connects without error.

Create crates/anvilml-server/src/ws/stats_tick.rs: pub fn start(broadcaster:Arc<EventBroadcaster>) spawns tokio task that every 5s calls sysinfo to read cpu_pct+ram_used_mib and sends WsEvent::SystemStats{cpu_pct,ram_used_mib,workers:vec![]}. Call start() in main.rs after server bind. websocat ws://127.0.0.1:8488/v1/events receives {"type":"system_stats"} frame within 6s.
